name: Overture
desc: Overture is an open-source, locally running web interface delivered as an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that visually maps out the execution plan of any …
descFull: Overture is an open-source, locally running web interface delivered as an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that visually maps out the execution plan of any AI coding agent as an interactive flowchart/graph before the agent begins writing code.
